capabilities.name: github
capabilities.title: GitHub
capabilities.oneLiner: Read repos, issues and PRs — every tool becomes a capability.
capabilities.author: Krelvan

capabilities.name: filesystem
capabilities.title: Filesystem
capabilities.oneLiner: Give an agent scoped read/write access to a local folder.
capabilities.author: Krelvan

capabilities.name: hn.top
capabilities.title: Hacker News
capabilities.oneLiner: Fetch the current top stories from Hacker News.
capabilities.author: Krelvan
capabilities.yaml:
name: hn.top
description: Fetch the current top story ids from Hacker News
sideEffect: read
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/topstories.json
  method: GET

capabilities.name: weather.fetch
capabilities.title: Weather
capabilities.oneLiner: Current forecast for any latitude/longitude — no key needed.
capabilities.author: Krelvan
capabilities.yaml:
name: weather.fetch
description: Fetch the current weather for a location (Open-Meteo, no key)
sideEffect: read
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude={{input.lat}}&longitude={{input.lon}}&current_weather=true
  method: GET
input:
  lat:
    type: string
    required: true
  lon:
    type: string
    required: true
responseField: current_weather

capabilities.name: wikipedia.summary
capabilities.title: Wikipedia
capabilities.oneLiner: Get the summary extract for any Wikipedia article.
capabilities.author: Krelvan
capabilities.yaml:
name: wikipedia.summary
description: Fetch the summary of a Wikipedia article
sideEffect: read
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: https://en.wikipedia.org/api/rest_v1/page/summary/{{input.title}}
  method: GET
input:
  title:
    type: string
    required: true

capabilities.name: discord.notify
capabilities.title: Discord notify
capabilities.oneLiner: Post a message to a Discord channel via webhook.
capabilities.author: community
capabilities.yaml:
name: discord.notify
description: Post a message to a Discord channel webhook
sideEffect: message-human
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: "{{secret:DISCORD_WEBHOOK}}"
  method: POST
  body:
    content: "{{input.message}}"
input:
  message:
    type: string
    required: true

capabilities.name: deploy.vercel
capabilities.title: Deploy to Vercel
capabilities.oneLiner: Ship a production deployment on Vercel via a Deploy Hook.
capabilities.author: Krelvan
capabilities.yaml:
name: deploy.vercel
description: Trigger a production deployment on Vercel via a Deploy Hook URL.
sideEffect: write-irreversible
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: "{{secret:vercel-deploy-hook}}"
  method: POST
  headers:
    Content-Type: "application/json"
  body:
    ref: "{{input.ref}}"
input:
  ref:
    type: string
    description: Optional git ref (branch or commit) to deploy.
successCodes:
  - 200
  - 201
  - 202

capabilities.name: deploy.netlify
capabilities.title: Deploy to Netlify
capabilities.oneLiner: Trigger a build and deploy on Netlify via a Build Hook.
capabilities.author: Krelvan
capabilities.yaml:
name: deploy.netlify
description: Trigger a build and deploy on Netlify via a Build Hook URL.
sideEffect: write-irreversible
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: "{{secret:netlify-build-hook}}"
  method: POST
  headers:
    Content-Type: "application/json"
  body:
    trigger_branch: "{{input.branch}}"
    trigger_title: "{{input.title}}"
input:
  branch:
    type: string
    description: Optional branch to build.
  title:
    type: string
    description: Optional reason shown in the Netlify deploy log.
successCodes:
  - 200
  - 201
  - 202
  - 204

capabilities.name: deploy.cloudflare_pages
capabilities.title: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages
capabilities.oneLiner: Queue a Cloudflare Pages deployment via a Deploy Hook.
capabilities.author: Krelvan
capabilities.yaml:
name: deploy.cloudflare_pages
description: Trigger a Cloudflare Pages deployment via a Deploy Hook URL.
sideEffect: write-irreversible
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: "{{secret:cloudflare-pages-hook}}"
  method: POST
  headers:
    Content-Type: "application/json"
  body:
    reason: "{{input.reason}}"
input:
  reason:
    type: string
    description: Optional human-readable reason for the deploy.
successCodes:
  - 200
  - 201
  - 202

capabilities.name: deploy.render
capabilities.title: Deploy to Render
capabilities.oneLiner: Trigger a deploy on Render via a service Deploy Hook.
capabilities.author: Krelvan
capabilities.yaml:
name: deploy.render
description: Trigger a deploy on Render via a service Deploy Hook URL.
sideEffect: write-irreversible
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: "{{secret:render-deploy-hook}}"
  method: POST
  headers:
    Content-Type: "application/json"
  body:
    ref: "{{input.ref}}"
input:
  ref:
    type: string
    description: Optional git ref (branch or commit SHA) to deploy.
successCodes:
  - 200
  - 201
  - 202

capabilities.name: deploy.railway
capabilities.title: Deploy to Railway
capabilities.oneLiner: Redeploy a Railway service via the GraphQL API.
capabilities.author: Krelvan
capabilities.yaml:
name: deploy.railway
description: Trigger a redeploy on Railway via the project GraphQL API.
sideEffect: write-irreversible
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: "https://backboard.railway.app/graphql/v2"
  method: POST
  headers:
    Content-Type: "application/json"
    Authorization: "Bearer {{secret:railway-token}}"
  body:
    query: "mutation($id: String!){ serviceInstanceRedeploy(serviceId: $id) }"
    variables:
      id: "{{input.serviceId}}"
input:
  serviceId:
    type: string
    required: true
    description: The Railway service id to redeploy.
successCodes:
  - 200

capabilities.name: serp.search
capabilities.title: SERP Search (Pro)
capabilities.oneLiner: Google-grade web search results via a managed SERP API.
capabilities.author: marketplace
capabilities.yaml:
name: serp.search
description: Web search results via SerpApi (requires a SERP_API_KEY)
sideEffect: read
estimateCents: 0
http:
  url: https://serpapi.com/search.json?q={{input.q}}&api_key={{secret:SERP_API_KEY}}
  method: GET
input:
  q:
    type: string
    required: true
